tool_use.name: Agent
tool_use.param: Run `make test-mcp` and report the full output including any error messages. If that doesn't work, try `cd packages/erk-mcp && uv run pytest`.

tool_use.name: Agent
tool_use.param: Run `make fast-ci` and report the final pass/fail status. Just tell me if it all passes or not, with details on any failures.

session.tool_result:
**All tests pass!**
Here's the summary: - **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1742 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: PASSED (19 CLAUDE.md files, 0 violations) - **Exec Reference Check**: Up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5869 passed in 12.93s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 138 passed in 2.90s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 124 passed in 0.65s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 50 passed
The entire fast-ci suite is green with no failures. agentId: ac51fa4cc4a139729 (use SendMessage with to: 'ac51fa4cc4a139729' to continue this agent) <usage>total_tokens: 14506 tool_uses: 1 duration_ms: 29218</usage>
session.assistant: All CI checks pass. Let me complete the remaining steps.
Now signal completion, upload session, clean up impl context, and submit.
